title: Four lawyers merge practices to form commercial law firm Quadra Legal
description: Quadra Legal, founded by four lawyers - Abhishek Adke, Himanshu Vidhani, Kaushalya Venkataraman and Vikrant Zunjarrao - has opened its offices in Mumbai and Bengaluru. Quadra Legal is a specialist commercial law firm with expertise in dispute resolution, insolvency & restructuring, banking & finance, corporate (private equity, venture capital, mergers and acquisitions and general advisory) and real estate.Zunjarrao and Adke folded their established independent practices into Quadra Legal
